channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [CHEMIESYNT] Chemiesynth (Vapi) Ltd Appoints M/s Purvi Gandhi & Associates as Internal Auditor for FY 2025-26 & 2026-27
item.description:
Chemiesynth (Vapi) Ltd, with CIN L24110GJ1986PLC008634 and GST Reg no 24AAACC9688H1ZC, has appointed M/s Purvi Gandhi & Associates, Chartered Accountant (Registration No. 145052W) as its Internal Auditor for the financial years 2025-26 and 2026-27. The appointment was made at a Board Meeting held on Wednesday, 25th March 2026, at 11:00 A.M. at Plot No. 27, GIDC, Vapi, Dist. Valsad, Gujarat 396195. The remuneration for the Internal Auditor will be mutually agreed upon between the Internal Auditor and the Board of Directors. The draft engagement letter specifying the scope, functioning, methodology, and remuneration was approved at the meeting.

  • Chemiesynth (Vapi) Ltd appoints M/s Purvi Gandhi & Associates as Internal Auditor for FY 2025-26 & 2026-27
  • Remuneration to be mutually agreed upon between the Internal Auditor and the Board of Directors
  • Appointment made at a Board Meeting held on 25th March 2026
  • Draft engagement letter specifying the scope, functioning, methodology, and remuneration approved

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Chemiesynth (Vapi) Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [COVANCE] Covance Softsol Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Q4 FY2026
item.description:
Covance Softsol Ltd, with scrip code 544361, has announced the closure of its trading window for the 4th quarter and year ending March 31, 2026, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading. The trading window will be closed from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the announcement of the audited financial results. The board meeting date for the financial results declaration will be informed in due course. Designated employees, key management personnel, directors, and other connected persons are advised not to enter into any transactions involving the company's securities during this period.

  • Trading window closure for Q4 FY2026 for Covance Softsol Ltd
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI regulations and company's Code of Conduct
  • Window to remain closed from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after financial results announcement
  • Board meeting date for financial results to be informed later
  • Designated employees, key management personnel, directors, and other connected persons advised not to transact during closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Covance Softsol Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ORIENTELEC] Orient Electric Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Orient Electric Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in the equity shares of the company by designated persons, including their immediate relatives and any other person for whom they make trading decisions. The closure is in accordance with the Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Designated Persons in the Securities of Orient Electric Limited, as per the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will remain closed from April 01, 2026, till the completion of 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for approval of the aforesaid Audited Financial Results will be intimated in due course.

  • Orient Electric Ltd closes trading window for designated persons.
  • Closure in accordance with the Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Designated Persons in the Securities of Orient Electric Limited.
  • Trading window to remain closed from April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results.
  • Date of Board Meeting for approval of Audited Financial Results to be intimated in due course.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Orient Electric Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [LORDSHOTL] Lords Ishwar Hotels Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for Designated Persons
item.description:
Lords Ishwar Hotels Ltd, in accordance with SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015, has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in securities of the company. The closure will be effective from 1st April, 2026 till the end of 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended on 31st March, 2026. This decision is in compliance with SEBI circular no. SEBI/HO/ISD/ISD-PoD-2/P/CIR/2023/124 dated 19th July, 2023, regarding Trading Window closure period under Clause 4 of Schedule B read with Regulation 9 of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The date of the Board Meeting for considering the Audited Financial Results will be intimated in due course.

  • Lords Ishwar Hotels Ltd announces trading window closure for designated persons
  • Closure effective from 1st April, 2026 till the end of 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results
  • Compliance with SEBI circular no. SEBI/HO/ISD/ISD-PoD-2/P/CIR/2023/124
  • Trading window closure in accordance with SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015
  • Date of Board Meeting to be intimated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Lords Ishwar Hotels Limited | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VISHAL] Vishal Fabrics Ltd. Appoints Mr. Umakant Sharma as Marketing Head and Vice President
item.description:
Vishal Fabrics Ltd. has appointed Mr. Umakant Sharma as the Marketing Head and Vice President with effect from March 25, 2026. Mr. Sharma brings over 25 years of experience in denim marketing, having a comprehensive understanding of the textile industry. His role has involved bridging production and marketing, coordinating with production teams on product launches, nurturing long-term client relationships, and maintaining a strong brand presence across key markets. He has worked extensively across domestic markets and with leading brands, bringing both strategic thinking and on-the-ground industry knowledge.

  • Appointment of Mr. Umakant Sharma as Marketing Head and Vice President
  • Mr. Sharma has over 25 years of experience in denim marketing
  • His role involves bridging production and marketing
  • He has worked extensively across domestic markets and with leading brands
  • His appointment is effective from March 25, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vishal Fabrics Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SANOFI] Sanofi India Ltd: Board Approves Dividend, Appointment of New Independent Director
item.description:
Sanofi India Ltd announced that its Board of Directors approved the convening of the 70th Annual General Meeting on 29th April 2026. The Board also recommended a final dividend of Rs. 48 per equity share for the Financial Year ended 31st December 2025. Furthermore, the Board approved the appointment of Mr. Siraj Azmat Chaudhry as an Additional Director and Independent Director for a term of 5 years, subject to the approval of the Members at the 70th AGM.

  • Sanofi India Ltd announced the convening of the 70th Annual General Meeting on 29th April 2026
  • The Board recommended a final dividend of Rs. 48 per equity share for the Financial Year ended 31st December 2025
  • Mr. Siraj Azmat Chaudhry appointed as an Additional Director and Independent Director for a term of 5 years

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sanofi India Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [MULTIBASE] Multibase India Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Multibase India Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the conclusion of the Board Meeting approving the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This move is in compliance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the 'Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Insiders' and 'Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosure of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information' of the company. The date of the Board meeting will be intimated in due course.

  • Trading window closure announced by Multibase India Ltd
  • Closure effective from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
  • Compliance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Applies to all Designated Persons, their immediate relatives, and Insiders as defined in the Company’s Code
  • Date of Board meeting to be intimated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MULTIBASE INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CALCOM] Calcom Vision Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Calcom Vision Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons, including promoters, directors, key managerial personnel, designated employees, and other connected persons. The closure will commence from April 01, 2026, and will continue till completion of 48 hours from the announcement of the financial results for the financial year ending March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of financial results will be intimated in due course.

  • Calcom Vision Ltd announces closure of trading window for designated persons.
  • Trading window closure starts from April 01, 2026, and lasts till 48 hours after financial results announcement.
  • Financial results are for the financial year ending March 31, 2026.
  • The date of the Board Meeting for financial results declaration will be shared later.
  • Closure affects promoters, directors, key managerial personnel, designated employees, and other connected persons.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CALCOM VISION LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KIFS] KIFS Financial Services Ltd Closes Trading Window for Q4 FY26 Results
item.description:
KIFS Financial Services Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the company's code of conduct for prevention of insider trading. The window will be closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026, are disseminated to the stock exchange.

  • Trading window closure announced by KIFS Financial Services Ltd
  • Closure effective from April 1, 2026
  • Window to reopen 48 hours after Q4 FY26 results are disseminated to the stock exchange
  • Move in line with the company's code of conduct for prevention of insider trading

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KIFS FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [JAIBALAJI] Jai Balaji Industries Ltd Closes Trading Window as per SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Jai Balaji Industries Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will be effective from April 1, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the company's audited financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended on March 31, 2026. The date of the board meeting where the results will be considered will be intimated in due course.

  • Jai Balaji Industries Ltd closes trading window as per SEBI regulations
  • Closure effective from April 1, 2026
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours after declaration of audited financial results
  • Board meeting date to be intimated later
  • Regulations in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JAI BALAJI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
